In general, the goal of GrowthX and the goal of this company is to kind of build a platform that can make knowledge work better.

I know it seems like very vague as a mission, but like at least, you know, like the highest level thing we like think about is that and our approach to it, you know, kind of weird to be honest, is to create this agency, which is like actually GrowthX and figure out what that means.
So, you know, we're starting with marketing.
We, the agency, for the most part, owns some piece of like growth function for our customers, usually around like content marketing, you know, socials to generate organic awareness.

And our whole approach and the whole thing that makes this agency different is like, instead of kind of doing this thing where you like hire this team of like freelancers that are there just like writing and you're managing that, we're kind of using AI.
To build these kind of systems of, you know, both AI agents and human experts that can create, like, really good content at scale.
